Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Riverseed]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 10''' — When infused with soulfire, a Riverseed's color changes from bright blue-green to deep sapphire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 14''' — The Riverseed is another name for Little Blue.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 17''' — The Sylvan Riverseed can be used to cleanse Orthos.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 19''' — Riverseed is a Sylvan.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 13''' — Orthos agreed with the Riverseed.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 5''' — Dross drifts over to the Riverseed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 9''' — Riverseed is a creature capable of squeaking.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — The Remnant had been taught a lesson by the Riverseed.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
